description: Broad seasonal ask should stay broad and ask for destination shape before exact dates.
turns: Somewhere warm in Europe this autumn.

description: Soft timing and tentative origin should stay provisional.
turns: Maybe early October for five-ish days, probably from London though Manchester could work too.

description: A confirmed destination correction should replace the old one and require reconfirmation.
Rejected destinations should not keep resurfacing as fresh suggestions.
turns: Not Prague. Give me somewhere sunnier.

description: Generic approval should not auto-select Quick Plan.
A clear quick-plan request after confirmation should select quick mode.
turns: Yes, that works. Build the quick draft.

description: Saved home-base context should stay optional rather than becoming a trip fact automatically.
turns: Yes, Lisbon in late September for 4 nights sounds right.

description: Booked items and narrow scope should stay reflected in selected modules.
turns: I already booked flights. Just help me with what to do in Kyoto.
